messages.content: Freedom planet CHARACTERS + naruto 4 age REACTED TO SAD NARUTO CHILDHOOD

Naruto:

As a child, Naruto would most likely have a mix of emotions in response to watching his own childhood. He could feel overwhelmed with sadness, anger or even disappointment towards those who ruined his childhood. However, he could also feel a sense of hope from seeing characters like the Freedom Planet cast who have gone through their own struggles rise up to fight back. Naruto would appreciate their resilience and would take inspiration from them to keep going despite the hardships he has experienced.
